title: Chemical Contaminants e-Notice - Canada.ca
content:
## Chemical Contaminants e-Notice
Join Health Canada's Chemical Contaminants e-Notice, a free service to stay on top of issued advice as well as regulatory and scientific developments in the area of food chemical contaminants in Canada.
Consumers, health professionals, as well as the food industry, can subscribe to Chemical Contaminants e-Notice. You will receive the latest Chemical Contaminants developments as they are issued by Health Canada.  With the current amendments taking place to the Food and Drug Regulations, these updates should help keep key stakeholders and Canadians current with our progress.  We encourage you to share this address with your colleagues.
Disclaimer: This tool is provided as an information dissemination service only. Health Canada will not assume responsibility for any system failures or omissions of notifications.
Visit the Chemical Contaminants webpage to view the complete list of topics related to this subject.

## Subscribe to Chemical Contaminants e-Notice
To subscribe, submit an email to chemicalcontaminants-subscribe-request@list.hc-sc.gc.ca with the email subject containing only the text " Subscribe ".
You will receive a confirmation e-mail from Chemical Contaminants e-Notice. You must reply to this confirmation e-mail in order to activate your e-Notice subscription.

## Cancel your Chemical Contaminants e-Notice Subscription
If you are already a subscriber and wish to cancel, submit an email to chemicalcontaminants-unsubscribe-request@list.hc-sc.gc.ca with the email subject containing only the text " Unsubscribe ".
You will receive a confirmation e-mail from Chemical Contaminants e-Notice. You must reply to this confirmation e-mail in order to cancel your e-Notice subscription.
Note : If you're having problems subscribing or unsubscribing, contact bcs-bipc@hc-sc.gc.ca .
